Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services

U.S. Department of Health & Human Services
7500 Security Boulevard, Baltimore, MD 21244

Data Source

Transformed Medicaid Statistical Information System (T-MSIS)
Program Period: October 2025 – March 2026
States: CA, FL, GA, IL, NY, OH, PA, TX

Methodology

Community engagement hours compiled from T-MSIS activity records. 80-hr/month threshold applied per 42 CFR §438. Fraud signals derived from billing pattern analysis.

DEMONSTRATION DATA — Synthetic records for methodology review only. Not for official publication. Dashboard generated: April 2026  |  CMS Division of Data Analytics
